description: SQL injection vulnerability in payment processing query. User input is directly interpolated into SQL statement without parameterization.
snippet: cursor.execute(f"SELECT * FROM transactions WHERE user_id = {user_id} AND amount > {amount}")

description: Hardcoded database password and API key found in development setup script.
Cross-site scripting (XSS) vulnerability in admin dashboard. User name is rendered without HTML escaping in template string.
SQL injection in authentication query. Username is directly concatenated into SQL string.
snippet: user = db.query(f'SELECT * FROM users WHERE username="{username}"')

description: Admin dashboard endpoint lacks authentication decorator. Any user can access admin functionality.
Path traversal vulnerability in file download endpoint. User-supplied filename is not validated.
